citations.narrative:
The licensee no longer uses this site for regulated activities and failed to notify APHIS Animal Care of the change. After
inspection personnel attempted to inspect the facility, a facility representative contacted the inspector and stated that they
have not used this site for regulated activities since 2025.
Failure to notify Animal Care of a change in location can make it difficult to verify regulated activities and ensure the
health and wellbeing of regulated animals.
A licensee shall notify Animal Care no fewer than 90 days before any change in the name, address, management,
substantial control or ownership of the business or operation, locations, activities, and number or type of animals.
Correct by: May 4, 2026.

citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:07am on April
22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone and by knocking on the door. Failure to provide
access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to
provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.1(b)(1) 
   
Requirements and application 
The licensee no longer uses this site for regulated activities and failed to notify APHIS Animal Care of the change. After 
inspection personnel attempted to inspect the facility, a facility representative contacted the inspector and stated that they 
have not used this site for regulated activities since 2025.  
Failure to notify Animal Care of a change in location can make it difficult to verify regulated activities and ensure the 
health and wellbeing of regulated animals. 
A licensee shall notify Animal Care no fewer than 90 days before any change in the name, address, management, 
substantial control or ownership of the business or operation, locations, activities, and number or type of animals. 
Correct by: May 4, 2026. 
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:07am on April 
22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone and by knocking on the door. Failure to provide 
access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to 
provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
